name: Observation and Protection of Anomalous Entities [O.P.A.E]
description:
"Does it looks unnatural? Does it acts unnatural? Does it has unnatural abilities? It is now under our protection." - O.P.A.E Directive

----------------------------------------------------

O.P.A.E, stands for "Observation and Protection of Anomalous Entities," is an organization that speaks for it's own name. Unlike the G.O.C, Foundation, or the Serpent's Hand, O.P.A.E treats anomalies way differently. While they still kind of built a place to contains them, it acts more like a Habitat Sector instead. Where anomalies weren't just contained in a white padded room, but in a large, built in ecosystem as for they please.
